name: forms-workspace
title: Agent-Native Forms Workspace
description: Agent-Native Forms Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

    "extensions",
    "forms",

  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Forms",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Forms Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.forms.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Ask",
          "route": "/forms/ask"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/forms/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/forms/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/forms/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions",
          "route": "/forms/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Forms Detail",
          "route": "/forms/forms/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Forms Detail Responses",
          "route": "/forms/forms/:id/responses"
        },
        {
          "label": "Forms Index",
          "route": "/forms/forms"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/forms/ask",
        "page": "page.forms.ask",
        "title": "Ask",
        "blocks": [
          "block.forms.ask"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/forms/app/routes/_app.ask.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/forms/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.forms.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.forms.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/forms/app/routes/_app.extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {

          "block.forms.extensions-detail"

      },
      {

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Forms template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
